title: Tilray Brands Reports Record Financial Results with 26% Net Revenue Growth
text: Tilray reported record annual revenue of $821 million for fiscal 2025. Beverage net revenue increased 19% to $240.6 million in fiscal 2025 from $202.1 million in the prior fiscal year, primarily due to the acquisition of craft beverage brands effective September 1, 2024. International cannabis revenue increased by 19% in fiscal 2025, with Q4 increasing by 71%. European cannabis revenue grew 112%, excluding Australia. Adjusted EBITDA in fiscal 2025 was $55 million, with fourth quarter adjusted EBITDA at $27.6 million. Total cannabis gross margin increased by 700 basis points in the fiscal year. Net loss was $2,181.4 million in fiscal 2025 compared to a net loss of $222.4 million in the previous fiscal year, mainly due to non-cash impairment of goodwill and intangible assets of $2,096.1 million. The company maintained a strong financial liquidity position of $256.4 million, consisting of $221.7 million in cash and $34.7 million in marketable securities. Fiscal Year 2026 Adjusted EBITDA is expected to be between $62 million - $72 million.
